tasks.title: Implement ActivityStore module (src/activityStore.js)
tasks.description: Create the JSONL-based persistence layer: append events, query with filters (spaceId, type, date range, cursor, limit), day-partitioned files in data/activity/, retention cleanup (delete files > 30 days).
acceptance_criteria: append(event) writes a single JSON line to data/activity/YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl
query({ spaceId, type, from, to, limit, cursor }) returns { events, nextCursor } reading newest-first
Malformed JSONL lines are skipped with a console warning, not thrown
cleanup() deletes .jsonl files older than 30 days
data/activity/ directory is created automatically if missing
Unit tests cover: append, query with all filter combinations, cursor pagination, retention cleanup, missing directory, malformed lines

tasks.title: Implement ActivityLogger module (src/activityLogger.js)
tasks.description: Create the event capture facade: receives mutation metadata, constructs ActivityEvent objects (id, type, spaceId, timestamp, actor, payload), calls ActivityStore.append(), and broadcasts to registered WebSocket listeners. Fire-and-forget: errors are logged, never thrown.
acceptance_criteria: createActivityLogger({ store, broadcast }) returns a logger with log(type, spaceId, payload) method
log() constructs event with crypto.randomUUID() id, ISO timestamp, 'system' actor
log() calls store.append(event) and broadcast(event) in sequence
Errors in append or broadcast are caught and logged, not re-thrown
Unit tests verify event construction, store.append called, broadcast called, error swallowing

tasks.title: Implement Activity WebSocket server (activity-ws.js)
tasks.description: Create the WebSocket endpoint at /ws/activity using ws npm in noServer mode. Handles upgrade requests, enforces localhost origin check, caps connections at 10, sends 'connected' message on open, broadcasts activity events to all connected clients, supports ping/pong keep-alive.
acceptance_criteria: setupActivityWebSocket(httpServer) registers an upgrade handler for /ws/activity path
Non-/ws/activity paths are ignored (not destroyed) so other upgrade handlers still work
Localhost origin validation matches LOCALHOST_ORIGINS set (same as terminal.js)
Max 10 concurrent connections; 11th gets HTTP 429
'connected' message with timestamp sent on successful connection
broadcast(event) sends JSON to all connected clients; per-client errors caught
Client 'ping' messages receive 'pong' response
maxPayload set to 8192 bytes
Connection cleanup on close (decrement counter)
Returns { broadcast } function for use by ActivityLogger

tasks.title: Fix terminal.js upgrade handler to pass through unknown paths
tasks.description: Change terminal.js line ~480 from socket.destroy() to return (no-op) for non-/ws/terminal upgrade paths. This allows multiple WebSocket upgrade handlers to coexist on the same HTTP server.
acceptance_criteria: Upgrade requests to /ws/terminal still work as before
Upgrade requests to /ws/activity are no longer destroyed by terminal.js
Upgrade requests to unknown paths are not destroyed (left unhandled)
Existing terminal.test.js tests still pass
New test: verify that a /ws/activity upgrade request is not rejected by terminal.js

tasks.title: Integrate ActivityLogger into server.js mutation handlers
tasks.description: Inject the ActivityLogger into createApp() as a parameter. Call logger.log() after the HTTP response is sent in all mutation handlers: handleCreateTask, handleMoveTask, handleUpdateTask, handleDeleteTask, handleClearBoard, handleUpdateAttachments. Also hook space mutation endpoints (create, rename, delete) in the top-level router.
acceptance_criteria: createApp(dataDir, { logger }) accepts an optional logger parameter
Each mutation handler calls logger.log(type, spaceId, payload) after sendJSON()
When logger is null/undefined, handlers work as before (no logging)
Space create/rename/delete endpoints in server.js also call logger.log()
Event types match the blueprint: task.created, task.moved, task.updated, task.deleted, board.cleared, space.created, space.renamed, space.deleted
Payload includes taskId, taskTitle (or spaceName) as specified in blueprint
All existing API tests still pass (no behavioral change to responses)

tasks.title: Wire up server.js startup: ActivityStore + Logger + WS
tasks.description: In the server.js startup sequence (after server.listen), instantiate ActivityStore, ActivityWS, and ActivityLogger. Wire them together: store -> logger -> broadcast. Schedule retention cleanup at startup and every 24h. Ensure data/activity/ directory exists.
acceptance_criteria: ActivityStore is created with data/activity/ directory
Activity WS server is set up on the HTTP server (after terminal WS)
ActivityLogger is created with store and broadcast function
Logger is passed to createApp() and to space route handlers
Retention cleanup runs at startup and every 24 hours
Server starts cleanly with no errors when data/activity/ does not exist yet

tasks.title: Add REST endpoint: GET /api/v1/spaces/:spaceId/activity
tasks.description: Add route handler for querying historical activity events for a specific space. Supports query parameters: type, from, to, limit, cursor. Returns { events, nextCursor }. Also add GET /api/v1/activity for global (all-space) queries.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1/spaces/:spaceId/activity returns events filtered by spaceId
GET /api/v1/activity returns events across all spaces
Query param 'type' filters by event type (e.g., task.moved)
Query params 'from' and 'to' filter by date range (ISO-8601)
Query param 'limit' caps results (default 50, max 200)
Query param 'cursor' enables cursor-based pagination
Response shape: { events: [...], nextCursor: string | null }
400 for invalid query params, 404 for unknown space, 500 for internal errors
Integration tests cover: no filters, type filter, date range, pagination, invalid params

tasks.title: Add MCP tool: kanban_list_activity
tasks.description: Add a new MCP tool in mcp/mcp-server.js that wraps the activity REST endpoint. Allows agents to query activity history programmatically.
acceptance_criteria: kanban_list_activity tool registered with parameters: spaceId (optional), type (optional), limit (optional, default 20)
Tool calls GET /api/v1/activity or GET /api/v1/spaces/:spaceId/activity
Returns formatted event list
Tool description is clear and matches existing tool naming conventions

tasks.title: Add TypeScript types for Activity Feed (frontend/src/types/index.ts)
tasks.description: Add ActivityEvent, ActivityFilter, and related types to the shared types file.
acceptance_criteria: ActivityEvent interface matches blueprint schema (id, type, spaceId, timestamp, actor, payload)
ActivityEventType union type covers all 8 event types
ActivityFilter interface has fields: type, from, to
ActivityQueryResponse interface has fields: events, nextCursor
Types exported from @/types

tasks.title: Add API client functions for Activity Feed (frontend/src/api/client.ts)
tasks.description: Add getActivity(spaceId, filters) and getGlobalActivity(filters) functions to the typed API client.
acceptance_criteria: getActivity(spaceId, params?) calls GET /api/v1/spaces/:spaceId/activity with query string
getGlobalActivity(params?) calls GET /api/v1/activity with query string
Both return Promise<ActivityQueryResponse>
Query params (type, from, to, limit, cursor) are properly URL-encoded
Unit test verifies correct URL construction

tasks.title: Add Zustand store slice for Activity Feed
tasks.description: Add activity-related state and actions to useAppStore: activityPanelOpen, activityEvents, activityFilter, activityUnreadCount, activityLoading, and corresponding actions (toggle, add event, set filter, load history, clear unread).
acceptance_criteria: activityPanelOpen boolean with toggle and setter, persisted in localStorage
activityEvents array holds live + loaded events (max 500 in memory, oldest dropped)
addActivityEvent(event) prepends to array, increments unreadCount if panel closed
setActivityFilter(partial) merges filter fields
loadActivityHistory(cursor?) calls API client, appends to events array
clearActivityUnread() resets unreadCount to 0
Selector hooks exported: useActivityPanelOpen, useActivityEvents, useActivityUnreadCount

tasks.title: Implement useActivityFeed hook (WebSocket lifecycle)
tasks.description: Create hook that manages the /ws/activity WebSocket connection: connect on mount, auto-reconnect with exponential backoff, parse incoming events, push to Zustand store. Ping/pong keep-alive every 30s.
acceptance_criteria: Connects to ws://localhost:3000/ws/activity on mount (or ws://localhost:5173/ws/activity in dev via Vite proxy)
Auto-reconnect with exponential backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, max 30s
Backoff resets on successful connection
Parses 'activity' messages and calls addActivityEvent in store
Sends ping every 30 seconds when connected
Cleans up WebSocket and timers on unmount
Unit tests with mocked WebSocket verify: connect, reconnect, event parsing, cleanup

tasks.title: Add Vite proxy config for /ws/activity
tasks.description: Update frontend/vite.config.ts to proxy /ws/activity WebSocket requests to localhost:3000, matching the existing /ws/terminal proxy pattern.
acceptance_criteria: /ws/activity proxied to ws://localhost:3000/ws/activity
WebSocket upgrade (ws: true) configured
Existing /ws/terminal proxy still works
Dev server connects successfully to activity WS through Vite proxy

tasks.title: Implement ActivityFeedPanel component
tasks.description: Create the sidebar panel component with header (title, close button), filter controls (event type dropdown, date range), scrollable event list, and empty state. Follows design system tokens and shared component patterns.
acceptance_criteria: Panel renders as an aside with resizable width via usePanelResize (like TerminalPanel)
Header shows 'Activity' title with close button (material-symbols-outlined close icon)
Event type filter dropdown with options: All, task.created, task.moved, task.updated, task.deleted, space.created, space.renamed, space.deleted, board.cleared
Each event card shows: icon (per type), human-readable description, relative timestamp (e.g., '2m ago')
Events auto-scroll to newest when at bottom, preserve position when scrolled up
Empty state shown when no events match filters
'Load more' button at bottom for paginated history loading
Uses Tailwind CSS tokens only (bg-surface, text-text-primary, etc.), no inline styles
Renders correctly in dark theme (default)

tasks.title: Add ActivityFeedToggle button to Header
tasks.description: Add an icon button to the header that toggles the ActivityFeedPanel. Shows unread count badge when panel is closed and new events have arrived.
acceptance_criteria: Icon button uses material-symbols-outlined 'notifications' icon
Click toggles activityPanelOpen in store
Badge shows activityUnreadCount when > 0 and panel is closed
Badge hidden when count is 0 or panel is open
Opening panel calls clearActivityUnread()
Button placement: in header bar, near terminal toggle and config toggle

tasks.title: Wire ActivityFeedPanel into App.tsx layout
tasks.description: Conditionally render ActivityFeedPanel in the flex layout row alongside Board, TerminalPanel, ConfigPanel. Mount useActivityFeed hook in AppContent so events accumulate regardless of panel visibility.
acceptance_criteria: ActivityFeedPanel renders when activityPanelOpen is true
Panel appears in the flex row after other panels
useActivityFeed() called in AppContent (always active)
Board resizes correctly when activity panel opens/closes
No layout regressions with terminal + activity panels both open

tasks.title: Backend integration tests for Activity Feed
tasks.description: Write integration tests covering the full backend flow: mutation triggers event logging, event appears in REST query, WebSocket broadcast delivers event.
acceptance_criteria: Test: creating a task produces a task.created event in the activity REST response
Test: moving a task produces a task.moved event with from/to columns
Test: deleting a task produces a task.deleted event
Test: clearing board produces a board.cleared event
Test: space create/rename/delete produce corresponding events
Test: type filter returns only matching events
Test: date range filter excludes out-of-range events
Test: cursor pagination returns correct pages
Test: WebSocket client receives broadcast within 500ms of mutation
All tests use the existing node:test runner

tasks.title: Frontend component tests for ActivityFeedPanel
tasks.description: Write Vitest + React Testing Library tests for ActivityFeedPanel, ActivityFeedToggle, and useActivityFeed hook.
acceptance_criteria: Test: panel renders event list from store
Test: filter dropdown updates store filter
Test: close button calls setActivityPanelOpen(false)
Test: toggle button shows/hides unread badge
Test: opening panel clears unread count
Test: useActivityFeed connects WebSocket and parses events
Test: useActivityFeed reconnects after disconnect
Tests run via cd frontend && npm test

tasks.title: Retention cleanup integration test
tasks.description: Write a test that verifies the 30-day retention cleanup: create JSONL files with old dates, run cleanup, verify only recent files remain.
acceptance_criteria: Test creates JSONL files dated 35 days ago and 10 days ago in a temp directory
cleanup() deletes the 35-day-old file and keeps the 10-day-old file
Test verifies file existence/absence after cleanup
Test uses node:test runner

tasks.title: Update CHANGELOG.md with Activity Feed feature
tasks.description: Add a changelog entry describing the Activity Feed feature: real-time push via WebSocket, JSONL persistence, sidebar panel with filters, REST query endpoint.
acceptance_criteria: Changelog entry follows existing format in CHANGELOG.md
Entry lists: WebSocket endpoint, REST endpoint, sidebar panel, 30-day retention
Entry mentions the terminal.js fix for multi-WS coexistence
